metadata.description: Azure Files PoC monitoring dashboard. Shows file share transactions, latency, bandwidth, top operations, and errors from Log Analytics.

notes: This JSON is a reference export of the dashboard deployed by monitoring.bicep.
You can customize it in the Azure portal and re-export, or edit this file and
re-deploy via Bicep. The dashboard pulls data from StorageFileLogs in the LAW.
Row 2: Ingress/Egress MB            | Top 10 operations by count
Row 3: Error details (status >= 400) -- full width grid

settings.content:
## Azure Files PoC -- Monitoring Dashboard
Shows key metrics for file shares deployed by this PoC. Data source: StorageFileLogs in the Log Analytics workspace.

content.Query:
StorageFileLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize RequestCount=count(), Failures=countif(StatusCode >= 400) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart

StorageFileLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize P50=percentile(DurationMs, 50), P95=percentile(DurationMs, 95), P99=percentile(DurationMs, 99) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart

StorageFileLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize IngressMB=sum(RequestBodySize)/1048576.0, EgressMB=sum(ResponseBodySize)/1048576.0 by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart

StorageFileLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Count=count() by OperationName
| top 10 by Count desc
| render barchart

StorageFileLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and StatusCode >= 400
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, StatusCode, StatusText, Uri, CallerIpAddress
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
